case_title: ROMAIN DELEBECQUE ET AL VS. GS MISSION OWNER, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ROMAIN DELEBECQUE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHE BARRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GS MISION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATHRINE LARA COMMUNITY MANAGER. DEFENDANT GS MISION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUAN GONZALEZ, SERVICE SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.18 FILED BY DELEBECQUE, ROMAIN BARRE, CHRISTOPHE AS TO DEFENDANT GS MISSION OWNER, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-15-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GS MISSION OWNER, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELEBECQUE, ROMAIN BARRE, CHRISTOPHE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GS MISSION OWNER, LLC $295.18 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.18, THE PAINTING TOUCH UP, CARPET CLEANING, AND $120 IN CLEANING FEES WERE NOT PROPER DEDUCTIONS AS TENANTS' ALLEGED DAMAGES WERE NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR AND TENANTS LEFT APARTMENT IN CLEAN CONDITION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT GS MISSION OWNER, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT GS MISSION OWNER, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELEBECQUE, ROMAIN BARRE, CHRISTOPHE AS TO DEFENDANT GS MISSION OWNER, LLC
